title: HTTP Request node execution timeout
symptom: The HTTP Request node shows 'Execution stopped' but continues running, causing the workflow to get stuck in a 'running' state indefinitely.
not_this_if: Shorter HTTP requests that complete within the timeout period
root_cause: The workflow execution times out due to the long duration of the HTTP request, which exceeds the configured timeout settings, leading to the 'Execution stopped' message while the request is still processing.
fix_steps: Increase the workflow timeout settings in n8n
Ensure the HTTP Request node's timeout is set to accommodate the expected duration of the request
Save the workflow and re-run it
agent_instruction: Adjust the workflow timeout settings to allow for longer HTTP requests.
